title: Clanky
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Clanky |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] ([[Cloning/Legends|clone]]) |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Improcco Company]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Master Camas is going to fry me when I get back.''"
"''Then he can fry us, too.|General Etain Tur-Mukan and Clanky|}} '''Clanky''' was a [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|clone trooper sergeant]] who served in [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]]'s [[Improcco Company]]. ==Biography== He fought side by side with the general during the [[Skirmish at Dinlo]]. He and his [[Squad/Legends|squad]] made it back alive. After the skirmish, Clanky gave [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Gett]] a summary of the battle. ==Equipment== Clanky had regular [[Phase I clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase I clone trooper armor]] with the traditional green markings of a [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|Clone trooper sergeant]]. He fought with a [[DC-15S/Legends|DC-15S]] and also made use of [[Electromagnetic pulse grenade/Legends|electromagnetic pulse grenades]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Clanky |pl=Clanky }} [[Category:41st Elite Corps personnel]] [[Category:Clone trooper sergeants]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
